title: setaria oblongata
intro: Setaria oblongata, also known as Chinese foxtail grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Setaria oblongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
